Simon Hans Edasi

Data scientist and geophysicist. UW graduate. Seattle, WA.

Seattle, WA

Art

Random Haiku

To make my 33rd year more interesting, and hopefully prevent it from blending in with all the others, I wrote a haiku to reflect every day. Enjoy a randomly selected poem from that year. To view the full catalog, click here.
Inspired by Skid Maher of the GCP, the original HaikuBoy.

Random Image

Sometimes I take a break from visualizing data to tinker with mathematical art. Here is a visualization of a random complex trigonometric function.
